title: Analysis and visualization of home budget
longDescription: This project arised in order to help me to control my home budget better. Over time, apart from just gathering data in Excel spreadsheets I wanted to introduce an element of its analysis and visualization in the form of reports/Powerpoint presentations. The longer the project lasted, the more automation and new functionalities have been implemented. Manual reports preparation was replaced with automated with a use of python-pptx library. Then, the one month analysis and visualization scenario was expanded with long-term scenarios covering a part or the whole of the available data. Finally, such actions as creating a worksheet for a new month or monthly executing the script with analysis have been automated. What still requires manual operation is primarily writing down the expenses and incomes into Excel files.

posts.postDescription: In the introductory post there is a presentation of the program concept and description of its functionalities
Here I describe how the input data is loaded and parsed
Description of the single month analysis scenario
Description of scenarios for the analysis of one year and the whole or a part of the entire time span for which data was collected
Additional functionalities that the program offers which allow to enhance automation
